affected_work.title: Genomic Decoding of Neuronal Depolarization by Stimulus-Specific NPAS4 Heterodimers

evidence_summary: ORI found knowingly or intentionally falsified/fabricated data, increased n-values with fabricated datasets, and manipulated fluorescence/confocal images across a published paper and grant materials.

affected_work.title: Nucleolar protein 66 functions as a novel negative regulator of satellite cells

evidence_summary: ORI found intentionally and knowingly falsified/fabricated western blot and microscopy images in submitted manuscripts and grant applications by manipulating, reusing, relabeling, or using unrelated images.

affected_work.title: Leptin-STAT3-G9a signaling promotes obesity-mediated breast cancer progression

evidence_summary: ORI found falsified/fabricated data in hundreds of panels across grant applications and two published papers, including reuse of data to represent unrelated experiments.
checker_patterns: same data reused as unrelated experiment

affected_work.title: Oral Cancer Prevention with Molecular Targeting Therapy

evidence_summary: PHS found fabricated/falsified research in a grant application and progress report, including fabricated survival results and false patient-screening numbers.

affected_work.title: Aging, energy expenditure, and obesity-related research outputs

evidence_summary: ORI lists this older case among administrative-action case summaries; use as a validation category for clinical-data fabrication and longitudinal-data audit warnings.

affected_work.title: Clinical trial records and eligibility documentation

evidence_summary: ORI lists this older case among administrative-action case summaries; use as a validation category for trial record, eligibility, and consent-document audit warnings.
Use only as a pattern bucket, not as a named allegation: paper mills commonly involve template manuscripts, fake data/images, purchased authorship, and manipulated peer review.
